label: Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers

node.label: Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers
node.definition: Adaptive optimizers such as AdaGrad, RMSProp, Adam, and Adafactor rescale parameter updates using running first- and second-moment statistics.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers is to connect SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization, Statistics & experimental design to downstream capabilities including Learning-rate schedules, warmup & stabilization.
examples: substrate for Learning-rate schedules, warmup & stabilization
combined with SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization, Statistics & experimental design.

dependencies.rationale: Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers uses SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers uses Statistics & experimental design as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers uses Numerical analysis as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
